headline: Emerson Electric (EMR) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Emerson Electric overview and recent share performance Emerson Electric (EMR) has drawn investor attention after recent share-price weakness, with the stock showing a negative return over the past month even as its year to date move remains positive. Over the past month, Emerson’s share price return is about 13% lower, while the past year shows a total return of roughly 28%. Its year to date return is about 3%, which gives a sense of how recent trading compares with longer term...
